evidence: standards/enterprise/supply-chain-legal.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: A release-integrity gap requires the exact artifact and missing linkage, affected release, owner, approved organization-policy decision, expiry, compensating custody controls, and provenance-restoration plan.
statement: Each distributable release artifact MUST be integrity-bound through the organization's release process to reviewed source revision, resolved dependency inventory, toolchain, and signing context.
